nodes.name: Schedule Trigger
nodes.notes: Runs every day at 9:00 AM. Adjust to your timezone in n8n settings.

nodes.name: OpenAI Usage
nodes.notes: Credential: HTTP Header Auth. Header name: Authorization, value: Bearer YOUR_OPENAI_KEY

nodes.name: Anthropic Usage
nodes.notes: Credential: HTTP Header Auth. Header name: x-api-key, value: YOUR_ANTHROPIC_KEY

nodes.name: Telegram Alert
nodes.notes: Add your Telegram Bot credential here.

nodes.name: Telegram Summary
nodes.notes: Optional: send daily green summaries too. Delete this node to only alert on thresholds.
